title: Shopping Short Beat Sheet
description: The data contract for one short. Skeleton fields are reusable; vo_monologue, beats[].vo_line and beats[].caption are regenerated per product in US English.

persona.description: Key from data/personas.yaml. Required. 'enthusiastic creator' is not allowed.

hook_type.description: Named hook archetype carried from the teardown.

pacing.description: Pacing rule from the skeleton, e.g. '1-1.5s cuts, full process compressed to 10s'.

vo_monologue.description: The full-duration VO written as ONE continuous monologue in the chosen persona, BEFORE splitting to beats. This field must be authored first.

caption.description: On-screen title — the CLAIM/spec. Compressed fragment. Must NOT equal the vo_line.

vo_line.description: Slice of the continuous monologue for this beat. Must REACT, not narrate the caption.

sealcam.description: Shot spec for the imagery engine (Higgsfield).

transition.description: Transition into the next beat (for the Remotion assembler).

caption.description: Short CTA caption, e.g. 'Comment NEED IT'.

mechanic.description: Funnel mechanic, e.g. 'comment keyword -> DM link'.

disclosure.description: FTC/Associates disclosure text. Literal, exempt from persona/ban-list.
